caption:
Women's looks of the week!

Swipe through the looks we've been building — a leather jacket worn like a second skin, gemstones catching the light where you least expect them, silk that moves the way island air does in April. Each piece arrived with its own quiet energy, and together they already feel like the beginning of something good.

Leather jacket & top: @la_haine_inside_us
Printed pants: @siyuline
Silk pants & top: @agenciesturquoise
Hat: @kangol
Necklace: @sharingbijoux
